items: Sword
A keen-edged blade balanced for cutting and thrusting.
Dagger
A short, sharp blade made for close work.
Shield
A broad guard of wood and metal carried on the arm.
Bow
A curved stave strung with sinew that launches arrows.
Spear
A long shaft tipped with a sharp point.
Axe
A heavy head on a stout handle made for chopping.
Hammer
A blunt weapon that delivers crushing blows.
Arrow
A feathered shaft with a sharp point.
Trident
A three-pronged spear forged for fighting on sea or land.
Scimitar
A curved blade designed for slashing from horseback.
Rapier
A thin, elegant blade built for precise thrusting.
Katana
A gently curved sword of folded steel and razor edge.
Cutlass
A short, heavy blade favored by sailors and pirates.
Mace
A flanged metal head on a handle, made to crush armor.
Lance
A long weapon designed for charging on horseback.
Flail
A spiked ball on a chain, swung in devastating arcs.
Crossbow
A mechanical bow mounted on a stock, easy to aim.
Whip
A long, flexible strip of leather that cracks through the air.
Harpoon
A barbed spear attached to a line, thrown at sea creatures.
